data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding commission rules by product/service/category, but there is no evidence in the prior steps that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for commission rules, yet the evidence provided focuses on other aspects of the booking process without confirming the existence or functionality of commission rules. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming 'Commission rules by product/service/category' is satisfied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
